message:
perf(mux): implement double-buffered PBO for async pixel readback

Replace synchronous glReadPixels with double-buffered Pixel Buffer Objects
for pipelined GPU->CPU pixel transfer on Linux. This hides transfer latency
by reading previous frame's data while current frame is being transferred.

- Add PboState struct with ping-pong buffer management
- Generate 2 PBOs with GL_STREAM_READ usage hint
- Async glReadPixels with null pointer (returns immediately)
- Map previous frame's PBO while current frame reads
- Linear memcpy with vertical flip (bottom-to-top read, top-to-bottom write)
- Handle first-frame case (return false, no previous data)
- Keep synchronous fallback for single-shot captures
